title: poa mulleri
intro: Poa mulleri, also known as Muller's fescue, is a type of grass native to New Zealand. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa mulleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat wounds, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
